info.title: SDKWork Order App API
info.description: App/client contract for sdkwork-order capability (split from retired sdkwork-commerce monolith).
info.x-sdkwork-audience: App, desktop, mobile, H5, and user-facing clients.

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

CommerceOperationCommand.description: Operation-specific command payload defined by the owning commerce Rust module.

status.description: Target status for the after-sales request lifecycle transition.

paymentProduct.description: QR payment product. H5 returns the order-bound cashierUrl; native products create a provider payment intent.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.

WriteCommandIdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
WriteCommandIdempotencyKey.description: Client retry key scoped by tenant, principal, method, and path.
